$comment: scripts/ViridianGym.asm ViridianGymGiovanniText — challenge -> OPP_GIOVANNI's party 3 (his gym fight; the hideout/Silph encounters use other party numbers and their own records) -> EARTHBADGE + BEAT_GIOVANNI + the gym's trainers defeated (gh #109) -> TM27. A full bag forfeits the TM for good (gh #174).

then.text:
Having lost, I
cannot face my
underlings!
TEAM ROCKET is
finished forever! I will dedicate my
life to the study
of POKéMON! Let us meet again
some day!
Farewell!

else.text:
Fwahahaha! This is
my hideout! I planned to
resurrect TEAM
ROCKET here! But, you have
caught me again!
This time, I'm
not holding back! Once more, you
shall face
GIOVANNI, the
greatest trainer!

then.text:
Ha!
That was a truly
intense fight!
You have won! As proof, here is
the EARTHBADGE!

The EARTHBADGE
makes POKéMON of
any level obey! It is evidence of
your mastery as a
POKéMON trainer! With it, you can
enter the POKéMON
LEAGUE!

TM27 is FISSURE! It will take out
POKéMON with just
one hit!
